Same empty frosted glass container held steady in frame, interior visibly clean and free of debris.
Static view of the clear, empty candle jar on the white surface, emphasizing its clean interior.

Final view of the prepared empty frosted-glass candle jar ready for the next step.

seconds_v2.desc: Amber fragrance oil pools in a glass measuring cup with red mL/oz markings; a metal stir stick is plunged into it under bright light.
The metal stirring tool moves through the golden oil in the clear measuring cup, swirling it gently.
Stir stick continues circling the amber liquid, which coats the lower walls of the glass cup.
Closer angle on the measuring cup as the metal stick stirs the small pool of fragrance oil.
The golden oil swirls around the stirring tool, catching light at the bottom of the glass cup.
Continued stirring blends the amber fragrance oil in the measuring cup.
Metal stir stick rests in the center of the swirling oil, the cup's red volume markings visible.
The amber liquid settles slightly as stirring slows inside the glass measuring cup.
Final swirl of golden fragrance oil in the measuring cup with the stir stick still inserted.
